title: OTP Screen - Verify 'Resend OTP' functionality
description: Tests the timer and the ability to request a new OTP after the cooldown period.
preconditions: User is on the OTP screen.

steps.description: 1. Wait for the 30-second resend timer to expire.
2. Verify the timer text disappears and a 'Resend OTP' link becomes tappable.
4. Verify a new OTP is sent to the user's phone.
5. Verify the resend timer restarts, counting down from 30 seconds again.

expected_result: A new OTP is successfully sent, and the resend timer UI is reset.
